content: Remote OK Video Editor OnlineJobs.PH <strong>About Us<br><br></strong>Bloom &amp; Beyond Design LLC is a luxury interior design company based in Dubai. We create high-end residential interiors and are looking for a talented full-time Video Editor to help grow both our company brand and our founderâs personal brand through engaging short-form content.<br><br><strong>Responsibilities<br><br></strong><ul><li> Edit Instagram Reels, TikTok videos, and other short-form content.</li><li> Create engaging edits with strong hooks, smooth pacing, captions, transitions, and sound effects.</li><li> Organize and manage raw footage efficiently.</li><li> Deliver high-quality videos within agreed deadlines.</li><li> Maintain a clean, premium editing style that aligns with our luxury brand.</li><li> Learn our editing style and progressively edit content with minimal guidance.</li><li> Stay up to date with social media trends and apply them where relevant.<br><br></li></ul><strong>Requirements<br><br></strong><ul><li> Proven experience editing short-form social media content.</li><li> Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve.</li><li> Strong understanding of storytelling, pacing, and audience retention.</li><li> Excellent attention to detail.</li><li> Reliable internet connection and availability to work full-time.</li><li> Good communication skills and willingness to learn and grow with the company.<br><br></li></ul>What Weâre Looking For<br><br>Weâre looking for someone creative, proactive, and passionate about creating content that performs. During the first few weeks, weâll work closely together to teach you our editing style. Our goal is for you to become confident enough to edit independently while maintaining our brand identity.<br><br>Application Process<br><br><strong>Please Submit<br><br></strong><ul><li> Your CV</li><li> Portfolio or examples of your best editing work</li><li> Three short-form videos youâre most proud of<br><br></li></ul>Shortlisted candidates will be invited to complete an editing test before the final interview. design, teaching, exec Time, 2026-06-27T10:53:58+00:00 1134184 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-video-editor-onlinejobs-ph-1134184 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Freelance Designer SAN Creatives Agency Job Openings<br><br>Freelance Designer<br><br>30/11/2023<br><br><strong>About Us<br><br></strong>We prioritize hiring individuals based on their core values rather than solely focusing on hard skills. Our approach is to empower exceptional candidates to excel in a role by leveraging their strengths, regardless of whether they precisely match a job description. As a result, we welcome applicants with varying levels of experience, both exceeding and falling short of the requirements outlined below.<br><br>PixelPiew is a privately owned studio specializing in design, branding, and creative services. Our mission is to drive the evolution and prosperity of financial services, B2B, corporate, and non-profit organizations. We achieve this by harnessing the power of research and craftsmanship to create refined brand identities, websites, messaging, campaigns, and marketing materials.<br><br>We Want<br><br>We Are Actively Seeking Skilled And Enthusiastic Freelance Designers To Join Our Roster Of Creative Professionals. This Is a Broad Application, And We Invite All Designers To Apply, With a Special Emphasis On Those Who Excel In The Following Areas:<br><br><ul><li> Logo and Brand Design</li><li> Motion Graphics Design</li><li> UX Design</li><li> Print Collateral Design</li><li> PowerPoint/Google Slides Presentation Design<br><br></li></ul>Please be aware that while we may not be able to respond to every applicant immediately, we will retain all submissions for potential future opportunities. If you are passionate about design and are eager to tackle exciting and demanding projects, we sincerely encourage you to reach out to us!<br><br><strong>Compensation<br><br></strong>This is a freelance, remote position, but you are also welcome to work on-site at our Providence, RI location if you prefer. We offer competitive compensation that aligns with your level of expertise and experience.<br><br>How to Apply<br><br>To apply, please email careers@pixelpier.com, including your resume and portfolio.
